body:
## Context
Members manage their household — view/edit family details and add/remove family members.

## What to do

### Create `src/app/(member)/member/family/page.tsx`

**Family Details card:**
- Family name, head of household, phone, address, member since
- "Edit" button opens slide-out panel with form (updateFamilyDetails action)

**Family Members list:**
- Avatar with initials, name, relationship badge
- "You" badge on current user
- "Edit" button per member
- "Add Member" button opens slide-out panel (addFamilyMember action)

### Slide-out panels
- Edit Family Details — form with family_name, phone, address
- Add Family Member — form with full_name, relationship (select)
- Same slide-out pattern as admin users mockup

## Design reference
See Family tab in `mockup-member-portal.html`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Family details are editable via slide-out panel
- [ ] Family members list shows all household members
- [ ] Add/remove family members works
- [ ] Head of household cannot be removed

## Dependencies
- #155 (member layout)
- #145, #146 (families + family_members tables)
- #151 (family management server actions)
title: Member portal: Family tab
